% ------------------------------------------------------------------------
% file `v1-exercise-5-solution-body.tex'
%   in folder `xsim/'
%
%     solution of type `exercise' with id `5'
%
% generated by the `solution' environment of the
%   `xsim' package v0.21 (2022/02/12)
% from source `v1' on 2022/09/08 on line 193
% ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    1 point pour $m$ et 1 point pour $p$.\\
    -0,5 point si l'expression entière n'est pas notée.
    \raggedcolumns
    \begin{enumerate}
        \item $f_1(x) = x+1$

              \begin{multicols}{2}
                  \textbf{$\bm{m}$ ?}
                  \medbreak
                  $m=\dfrac{7-2}{6-1}=\dfrac{5}{5}=1$

                  \textbf{$\bm{p}$ ?}
                  \medbreak
                  $\begin{aligned}[t]
                          A(1;2)\in f_1 \Rightarrow 2 & = 1\cdot 1 + p \\
                          p                           & = 1
                      \end{aligned}$
              \end{multicols}
        \item $f_2(x) = -3x+5$
              \begin{multicols}{2}
                  \textbf{$\bm{m}$ ?}
                  \medbreak
                  $m=\dfrac{-10-11}{5+2}=-\dfrac{21}{7}=-3$

                  \textbf{$\bm{p}$ ?}
                  \medbreak
                  $\begin{aligned}[t]
                          (-2;11)\in f_2 \Rightarrow 11 & = -2\cdot (-3) + p \\
                          p                             & = 5
                      \end{aligned}$
              \end{multicols}
        \item $f_3(x) = 3x + 6$
              \begin{multicols}{2}
                  \textbf{$\bm{m}$ ?}
                  \medbreak
                  $G_f \parallel G_g \Rightarrow m = 3$
                  \columnbreak

                  \textbf{$\bm{p}$ ?}
                  \medbreak
                  $\begin{aligned}[t]
                          \text{La racine est }-2\Rightarrow 0 & = 3\cdot (-2) + p \\
                          p                                    & = 6
                      \end{aligned}$
              \end{multicols}
        \item $f_4(x) = \dfrac{7x}{2}$
              \begin{multicols}{2}
                  \textbf{$\bm{m}$ ?}
                  \medbreak
                  $f_4$ est linéaire $\Rightarrow (0;0) \in f_4$
                  \medbreak
                  $m = \dfrac{14-0}{4-0} = \dfrac{14}{4} = \dfrac{7}{2}$
                  \columnbreak

                  \textbf{$\bm{p}$ ?}
                  \medbreak
                  $f_4$ est linéaire $\Rightarrow p=0$
              \end{multicols}
        \item $f_5 = 2x-2 $
              \begin{multicols}{2}
                  \textbf{$\bm{m}$ ?}
                  \medbreak
                  $m=\dfrac{2}{1} = 2$
                  \columnbreak

                  \textbf{$\bm{p}$ ?}
                  \medbreak
                  $p=-2$
              \end{multicols}
    \end{enumerate}
    \newpage
